completed_tasks.name: Fisher covariance rotation code (tasks 1-8)
completed_tasks.notes: migrate_crb_to_ecliptic.py rotates full 14x14 Fisher covariance (Sigma_ecl=R*Sigma_eq*R^T). Detection.__init__ hard-errors on missing _coord_frame/_cov_frame. 535 tests passing.

completed_tasks.name: Combine + generate figures (job 4148484)
completed_tasks.notes: Done. Figures rsynced to results/figures_seed200/. MAP=0.86 — BIASED, H1 bug confirmed (see context_notes).

remaining_tasks.name: Fix D(h) normalization in combine path
remaining_tasks.priority: HIGH — paper blocker, PHYSICS CHANGE required
remaining_tasks.notes: posterior_combination.py:combine_posteriors() (line 476) calls combine_log_space(processed) with NO D(h) term. Fix: compute D(h) per h-value and subtract N_det*log(D(h)) from each h-column of the log-likelihood array before combining. This matches what --evaluate does in bayesian_statistics.py:352-358 via precompute_completion_denominator(). Physics-change protocol required before writing code. Reference: Gray et al. 2020 Eq. A.19.

remaining_tasks.name: Cluster-side covariance migration (fisher-frame-mismatch-fix task 9)
remaining_tasks.priority: HIGH — needed before paper production run
remaining_tasks.notes: Production CSVs in run_20260401_seed200/simulations/ have _coord_frame but no _cov_frame (pos-only migrated state). Steps: (1) sync commit ab4bc80 to cluster via git pull, (2) run: uv run python scripts/migrate_crb_to_ecliptic.py simulations/ in the run dir. Script handles pos-only state automatically via .bak_equatorial backups.

decisions.decision: Fix approach for combine D(h): subtract N_det * log(D(h)) per h-value inside combine_posteriors(), reusing precompute_completion_denominator() from bayesian_statistics.py
decisions.rationale: Gray et al. 2020 Eq. A.19. Without it, D(h) grows monotonically with h -> raw log-likelihood always increasing -> MAP pinned to h_max.

decisions.decision: Sequencing: fix combine D(h) + covariance migration BEFORE paper production. --evaluate MAP=0.730 is the only trustworthy current result.
decisions.rationale: combine MAP=0.860 confirmed biased this session. User requested verify-first sequencing.

next_action: Start session with physics-change protocol for D(h) fix in posterior_combination.py:combine_posteriors(). Present old formula (no D(h)), new formula (subtract N_det*log(D(h)) per h), reference Gray 2020 Eq. A.19, dimensional analysis, limiting case. Then implement after approval.
context_notes: The --evaluate path (BayesianStatistics.evaluate() in bayesian_statistics.py) is CORRECT — applies D(h) via precompute_completion_denominator(), gave MAP=0.730 in Phase 43. The --combine path (combine_posteriors() in posterior_combination.py) is MISSING D(h) — confirmed this session: MAP=0.860 with posterior entirely at grid ceiling h=0.86. The fix is one targeted addition in combine_posteriors(). precompute_completion_denominator() in bayesian_statistics.py can be imported and reused directly.
